markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, feedback, and holiday scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** A new `Content OS` workflow will manage the 5-article/week review cadence, replacing Slack updates to streamline coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:** Key feedback: fix inconsistent bullet punctuation, improve link relevance, and integrate more data-rich case studies beyond simple hyperlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Holiday Cadence:** A 10-article batch is due this week to create a buffer for the holiday break. Production will resume the first week of January.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [**Strategic Initiatives:** The blog is now "The Source" (V1 by EOY, V2 in Q1). Analytics reporting is blocked pending a procurement contract.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Cadence

  - [**Problem:** The current Slack-based workflow is inefficient for managing the 5-article/week review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new `Content OS` workflow will centralize status tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
        1.  [**Udemy:** Mark articles `Revisions Needed` → notifies GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
        2.  [**GrowthX:** Apply revisions → mark `Revisions Complete`.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
        3.  [**Udemy:** Publish → mark `Published` → notifies GrowthX to grab the URL.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Goal:** GrowthX to take over publishing in mid-January, pending Udemy team onboarding to the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Content Feedback & Refinements

  - [**Bullet Punctuation:** Inconsistent use of periods.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Full sentences in bullets require periods; non-sentences do not.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will enforce consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** Recent links were out of context.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will investigate and correct the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Case Study Integration:** Need more prominent use of case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Steph and Jen want more than simple hyperlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will explore dedicated, SEO-optimized sections.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Resource:** Justin will provide 1–2 strong examples.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Tables:** Use tables selectively for unique, data-driven content.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will source data from Udemy reports and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Holiday Schedule

  - [**This Week (Dec 16–20):**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Deliver 10 new articles to create a buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Udemy:** Publish 5 articles Friday; review the next 5 for publication on Christmas Eve.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Christmas Week (Dec 23–27):**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Limited availability; urgent pings via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Udemy:** Limited availability for reviews/publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**New Year's Week (Dec 30–Jan 3):**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** "Quiet Week" for internal projects; some revision work possible.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Udemy:** More online for reviews/publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**January:** Production resumes the first full week.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Strategic Initiatives

  - [**Analytics Dashboard:** Blocked pending a procurement contract.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [**Status:** Justin requested an update from procurement.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will provide `teams@growthxlab.com` access upon approval.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**New Blog Events:** Justin requested a new event to track "Get a Demo" clicks on blog URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Current events only fire on the demo page, providing no blog-specific data.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will brainstorm other useful events (e.g., case study clicks).](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:** GrowthX will research the UBC scorecard topics during the quiet week.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [**Resource:** Justin shared a BrightEdge "fanout" Excel sheet with ChatGPT queries.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [**Goal:** Collaborate on a joint research project, targeting completion by Feb 15.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [**Blog Redesign ("The Source"):**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Name:** "The Source" (nav will remain "Blog" for now).](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [**V1 (EOY):** Basic WordPress design.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [**V2 (Q1):** Enhanced design with banners and course cards.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [**Course Cards:** Will promote relevant courses without linking directly in content, addressing a key stakeholder request.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

### Meeting Cadence & Contacts

  - [**New Cadence:** Bi-weekly strategic calls starting in January.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To focus meetings on strategy; async Monday updates will cover weekly progress.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**Contact List:** Katya will add a table to the agenda for Justin to update with current Udemy contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [Record a Loom walkthrough of the `Content OS` workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [Enforce consistent bullet punctuation and link relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [Brainstorm blog events (e.g., case study clicks).](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Begin keyword research on UBC scorecard topics.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [Send async Monday updates, tagging Justin.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Provide 1–2 examples of strong case study integration.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [Update the contact list in the agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [Provide `teams@growthxlab.com` with analytics access upon approval.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Ensure the next 5 articles are reviewed by Thursday midday for Friday revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/K5ysyNsEUtzvyQLRYjF6btcCvSyXPkox?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
